seo.home_description: Son Mullet: authentic agrotourism in the heart of the Serra de Tramuntana, Mallorca. Rural experiences, local gastronomy and the essence of the Mediterranean.
seo.login_description: Access the Son Mullet internal panel.
seo.register_description: Create an account to access the Son Mullet intranet.
seo.intranet_description: Son Mullet internal notes and incidents panel.

hero.description: Discover Son Mullet, a traditional Mallorcan farmhouse in the heart of the mountains. Authentic experiences, zero-kilometre gastronomy and the peace that only a Mallorcan hillside can offer.

about.subtitle: About Us
about.title: A farmhouse with Mallorcan soul
about.desc_1: Son Mullet is more than accommodation: it's a window into rural Mallorcan life. Located on a hillside of the Serra de Tramuntana, our family estate combines dry-stone architecture with contemporary comfort.
about.desc_2: Here you can stroll among centuries-old olive trees, taste traditional cuisine with produce from our garden, and watch the most spectacular sunsets on the island.

experiences.subtitle: Our Experiences
experiences.title: Mallorca like you've never lived it
experiences.description: We design every experience so you can feel the island with all five senses. From olive harvesting to dinners under the stars.
experiences.card1_desc: Join in at the olive press and discover the artisanal process of Mallorcan olive oil, from tree to bottle.
experiences.card2_desc: Dine with produce from our garden and traditional Mallorcan cuisine under the starlit sky of the mountains.
experiences.card3_desc: Rooms with character: stone, wood and linen. Wake up to birdsong and the scent of rosemary.

booking_section.subtitle: Booking
booking_section.title: Book your getaway
booking_section.description: Whether it's a weekend escape or a longer stay, we'll prepare everything so you can enjoy rural Mallorcan life to the fullest.
booking_section.perk1: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before
booking_section.perk3: Access to the garden and natural pool

contact_section.subtitle: Contact
contact_section.title: Have a question?
contact_section.description: We'll be happy to help you plan your perfect getaway. Don't hesitate to write or call us.
contact_section.address_value:
Camí de Son Mullet, s/n
Serra de Tramuntana, Mallorca

footer.brand_desc: Family agrotourism in the Serra de Tramuntana. Tradition, nature and the authentic essence of Mallorca.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Son Mullet Agrotourism. All rights reserved.
